title: sarcomphalus levigatus
intro: Sarcomphalus levigatus, also known as Wild Jasmine or Yellow Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Sarcomphalus levigatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
